content_blocks.text:
अथोर्ध्वदृष्टी दिननाथमौमौ दृष्टिः कटाक्षेण कवीन्दुरून्वोः ।
शशांकगुर्वोः समभागदृष्टिर धोक्षिषातस्त्वहिनाथशन्योः ॥ ३२ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
अथोर्ध्वदृष्टी दिननाथमौमौ दृष्टिः कटाक्षेण कवीन्दुरून्वोः ।
शशांकगुर्वोः समभागदृष्टिर धोक्षिषातस्त्वहिनाथशन्योः ॥ ३२ ॥

content_blocks.text:
The Sun and Mars look upwards.
Venus and Mercury look sideways The Moon and
Jupiter look evenly. The looks of Rahu and Saturn
incline downwards.

verse_data.translation:
The Sun and Mars look upwards.
Venus and Mercury look sideways The Moon and
Jupiter look evenly. The looks of Rahu and Saturn
incline downwards.

content_blocks.text:
स्वोच्चत्रिकोण खसुहृदृगाणराश्यंशवैशेषिकवर्गवन्तः ।
आरोहवीर्याधिकबिंदुकास्ते खेचारिणः स्थानबलाधिकाः स्युः ॥३३॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
स्वोच्चत्रिकोण खसुहृदृगाणराश्यंशवैशेषिकवर्गवन्तः ।
आरोहवीर्याधिकबिंदुकास्ते खेचारिणः स्थानबलाधिकाः स्युः ॥३३॥
verse_data.topic: Conditions for predominant strength of planets

content_blocks.text:
नीचारिपापखगयोगनिरीक्ष्यमाणा-
स्तद्वर्गसन्धिल घुबिंदुदुरंशकाश्च ।
आदित्यरश्मिपरिभूतपराजितास्ते
दृष्ट्यादिशत्यसहिताश्च न शोभनाः स्युः ॥ ३४ ॥

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
नीचारिपापखगयोगनिरीक्ष्यमाणा-
स्तद्वर्गसन्धिल घुबिंदुदुरंशकाश्च ।
आदित्यरश्मिपरिभूतपराजितास्ते
दृष्ट्यादिशत्यसहिताश्च न शोभनाः स्युः ॥ ३४ ॥

content_blocks.text:
Planets have predominant strength of
position (स्थानबल-Stthanabala) when they occupy the
Vaiseshika Vargas (Vide Adhyaya I, Stoka. 44. Supra.)
produced by the combination of three or more of the
Vargas enumerated below:--

verse_data.translation:
Planets have predominant strength of
position (स्थानबल-Stthanabala) when they occupy the
Vaiseshika Vargas (Vide Adhyaya I, Stoka. 44. Supra.)
produced by the combination of three or more of the
Vargas enumerated below:--
verse_data.topic: Conditions for predominant strength of planets

content_blocks.text:
स्वेच-Swochcha (the planet's own exaltation sign),
स्वत्रिकोण-Swathrikona (the planet's Moolathrikona), स्वधु-
-Swasuhrid (the plants friend's house), स्वग्रेकाण-Swa-
drekkana (the planet's own Drekkana), स्वराशि-Swa Rasi
(the planet's own house), स्वशि-Swa-amsa (the planet's
own Navamasa), and being in the ascendant possess nu-
merous benefic dots (more than 4, vide Adhyaya 10,
on Ashtaka Varga).

Planets which do not possess benefic
aspect or other such good influences may not prove
auspicious when they are in their depression, or in
conjunction with inimical or malefic planets craspected

verse_data.translation:
Planets which do not possess benefic
aspect or other such good influences may not prove
auspicious when they are in their depression, or in
conjunction with inimical or malefic planets craspected

raw_text:
360
Adh. II
अथोर्ध्वदृष्टी दिननाथमौमौ दृष्टिः कटाक्षेण कवीन्दुरून्वोः ।
शशांकगुर्वोः समभागदृष्टिर धोक्षिषातस्त्वहिनाथशन्योः ॥ ३२ ॥
Sloka. 32. The Sun and Mars look upwards.
Venus and Mercury look sideways The Moon and
Jupiter look evenly. The looks of Rahu and Saturn
incline downwards.
स्वोच्चत्रिकोण खसुहृदृगाणराश्यंशवैशेषिकवर्गवन्तः ।
आरोहवीर्याधिकबिंदुकास्ते खेचारिणः स्थानबलाधिकाः स्युः ॥३३॥
नीचारिपापखगयोगनिरीक्ष्यमाणा-
स्तद्वर्गसन्धिल घुबिंदुदुरंशकाश्च ।
आदित्यरश्मिपरिभूतपराजितास्ते
दृष्ट्यादिशत्यसहिताश्च न शोभनाः स्युः ॥ ३४ ॥
Stoku. 33. Planets have predominant strength of
position (स्थानबल-Stthanabala) when they occupy the
Vaiseshika Vargas (Vide Adhyaya I, Stoka. 44. Supra.)
produced by the combination of three or more of the
Vargas enumerated below:--
स्वेच-Swochcha (the planet's own exaltation sign),
स्वत्रिकोण-Swathrikona (the planet's Moolathrikona), स्वधु-
-Swasuhrid (the plants friend's house), स्वग्रेकाण-Swa-
drekkana (the planet's own Drekkana), स्वराशि-Swa Rasi
(the planet's own house), स्वशि-Swa-amsa (the planet's
own Navamasa), and being in the ascendant possess nu-
merous benefic dots (more than 4, vide Adhyaya 10,
on Ashtaka Varga).
Sloka. 34. Planets which do not possess benefic
aspect or other such good influences may not prove
auspicious when they are in their depression, or in
conjunction with inimical or malefic planets craspected
